name: Fig Gems
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm your food grinder.
2. With the medium blade, grind figs, raisins and nuts together.
3. Stir the ground mixture with sugar and peanut butter until combined.
4. Add honey to soften the mixture enough to make the fruit pliable.
5. Using your hands, form small walnut-sized balls from the mixture and roll them in confectioners' sugar.
6. Place the coated balls on a pretty plate or tray.
7. Surround them with figs stuffed with candied cherries or nut halves for a festive centerpiece (which will disappear quickly).
